[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111101110 7
1 110000011 4
2 010101100 4
3 100000011 3
4 100100000 2
5 100110100 4
6 101000110 4
7 001100111 5

01 10 100100000 2 match 4
12 21 100000100 2
23 32 001000110 3
34 43 001000010 2
45 54 000000000 a
56 65 000101100 3
67 76 100000011 3 match 3
70 07 100000000 1

02 20 100000000 1
13 31 000100100 2

35 53 000100100 2

57 75 000000000 a
60 06 100100000 2 match 4
71 17 100000000 1
